Class GenerarReservaDTO

Namespace
BLL.DTOs
Assembly
BLL.dll

Command object carrying all inputs required to create a new reservation via ReservaService.GenerarReserva.

public class GenerarReservaDTO
Inheritance
object
GenerarReservaDTO
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

Duracion must be a positive integer representing minutes. Adelanto is the partial payment collected at booking time; it may be zero but must not be negative. Availability is validated against the space's agenda and existing reservations inside the service.

Constructors

GenerarReservaDTO() 

public GenerarReservaDTO()

Properties

Adelanto

Advance payment amount to register at the time of booking.

public decimal Adelanto { get; set; }

Property Value

decimal

ClienteId

FK to the client making the reservation.

public Guid ClienteId { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid

Duracion

Requested duration in minutes.

public int Duracion { get; set; }

Property Value

int

EspacioId

FK to the space being reserved.

public Guid EspacioId { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid

FechaHora

Exact start date and time of the requested reservation.

public DateTime FechaHora { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime
